summary: Comprehensive testing of Kassa POS system (Kassasysteem) for Suriname. All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with SumUp-style design. Login/Registration flows work correctly, POS interface with product grid, cart management, category filtering, search, and payment checkout all working as expected.

issues: Some test products (TEST_Order_Product_xxx) created during backend testing are visible with generic salad images - these should be cleaned up in production

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Modern professional login screen with email/password fields
frontend_tests.registration_form: PASS - Business name, email, password, phone fields with 14-day trial messaging
frontend_tests.pos_product_grid: PASS - 16 products displayed with images, vertical names, SRD prices
frontend_tests.category_filtering: PASS - 9 categories (Alles, Algemeen, Dranken, Koffie, Eten, Gebak, Overig, Snacks, TEST_Speciale Koffies)
frontend_tests.cart_management: PASS - Add/remove products, quantity controls (+/-), item totals
frontend_tests.cart_totals: PASS - Subtotal, BTW 8%, Total calculated correctly
frontend_tests.checkout_button: PASS - Enables when cart has items
frontend_tests.payment_modal: PASS - Shows total, Cash/PIN/QR options, amount input, quick buttons (20,50,100,200)
frontend_tests.payment_processing: PASS - Order created with POS-YYYYMMDD-NNNN format number
frontend_tests.success_modal: PASS - Shows 'Betaling Geslaagd!' with order number, Bon/Nieuwe Verkoop buttons
frontend_tests.logout: PASS - Logs out and redirects to login page

api_tests.POST /api/kassa/auth/register: PASS - Creates new business with trial subscription
api_tests.GET /api/kassa/auth/me: PASS - Returns current user and subscription info
api_tests.POST /api/kassa/orders: PASS - Creates new order with BTW calculation

critical_code_review_comments: SumUp-style UI design implemented correctly with minimalist white theme
Product cards show vertical names (rotated text) as specified
Prices displayed in SRD format with proper Dutch locale formatting (comma as decimal separator)
Category tabs positioned on right sidebar with blue active state
Cart positioned on left sidebar with Bestelling header
BTW 8% calculation works correctly for Suriname tax requirements
Order numbers generated with POS-YYYYMMDD-NNNN format
Payment modal supports Cash (Contant), PIN, and QR methods
Authentication context properly manages login state and token storage
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed products, categories, customers, and orders during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kassa POS system fully functional. All authentication, product management, cart, checkout, and payment flows work correctly. Test account demo@koffiebar.sr has 16 products across multiple categories. Superadmin endpoint /api/kassa/superadmin/login works with admin@kassapos.sr credentials.
